hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | grep -Eq '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|css|scss|json|md|html|vue|svelte)$' && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | xargs -r npx --no-install prettier --write 2>/dev/null; exit 0
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx) npx --no-install eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0

c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$c" | grep -Eq 'rm[[:space:]]+-[a-z]*r[a-z]*f?[[:space:]]+(/|~|\$HOME|\*)|mkfs|dd[[:space:]]+if=' && { echo 'loadout: blocked a dangerous command' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0

c=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$c" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+push' && b=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) && echo "$b" | grep -Eq '^(main|master)$' && { echo "loadout: refusing to push directly to $b — use a branch + PR" >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
